rationale: In the citing paper, Wedel and Zhang (2004) appears only once in a grouped citation listing prior studies on NB-PL pricing issues. The text uses it as general background to contrast prior price-focused research with this paper's nonprice new-product focus. There is no specific discussion of Wedel and Zhang's model, findings, or measures, and no clear dependence in hypothesis development or empirical design tied to that paper.
